Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc

Interface SqlQuery<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type mapped to the data row of the query result set
All Superinterfaces:
SqlOperation
public interface SqlQuery<T> extends SqlOperation
This interface represents the query operation of a SQL statement.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    close()
    Releases the Statement/PreparedStatement and ResultSet (if it has) resources of this operation.
    default @Nonnull ResultSet
    execute()
    Executes this query and returns the result set.
    default T
    first()
    Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using JdbcKit.defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
    default T
    first(@Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper)
    Executes this query and returns the first row of the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
    default T
    first(@Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    Executes this query and returns the first row of the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery.
    default @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T>
    list()
    Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using JdbcKit.defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
    default @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T>
    list(@Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper)
    Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
    default @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T>
    list(@Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery.
    @Nonnull Type
    type()
    Returns the type mapped to the data row of the query result set.

    Methods inherited from interface space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc.SqlOperation

    preparedStatement, statement

  • Method Details

    • execute

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull ResultSet execute()
      Executes this query and returns the result set.
      Returns:
      the result set of this query

    • type

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Type type()
      Returns the type mapped to the data row of the query result set.
      Returns:
      the type mapped to the data row of the query result set

    • first

      @Nullable default T first() throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using JdbcKit.defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type. If the result set is empty, returns null.
      Returns:
      the first row of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • first

      @Nullable default T first(@Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes this query and returns the first row of the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type. If the result set is empty, returns null.
      Parameters:
      nameMapper - the mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      Returns:
      the first row of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • first

      @Nullable default T first(@Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes this query and returns the first row of the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery. If the result set is empty, returns null.
      Parameters:
      nameMapper - the mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      converter - the converter to convert the JDBC type to the java type
      options - the options for converting
      Returns:
      the first row of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • list

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> list() throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using JdbcKit.defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • list

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> list(@Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
      Parameters:
      nameMapper - the mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • list

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> list(@Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes this query and returns the result set of this query as a list of type SqlQuery.
      Parameters:
      nameMapper - the mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      converter - the converter to convert the JDBC type to the java type
      options - the options for converting
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • close

      default void close() throws SqlRuntimeException
      Description copied from interface: SqlOperation
      Releases the Statement/PreparedStatement and ResultSet (if it has) resources of this operation.

      Note this method only closes the statement and result set, not the connection.

      Specified by:
      close in interface SqlOperation
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs
